name: ML-DSA.KeyGen_internal
label: Algorithm 6
body_raw: (𝜌, 𝜌′, 𝐾) ∈ 𝔹 32 × 𝔹64 × 𝔹32 ← H(𝜉||IntegerToBytes(𝑘, 1)||IntegerToBytes(ℓ, 1), 128)
𝐀 ← ExpandA(𝜌) ▷ 𝐀 is generated and stored in NTT representation as 𝐀
𝐭 ← NTT−1(𝐀 ∘̂ NTT(𝐬1)) + 𝐬2 ▷ compute 𝐭 = 𝐀𝐬1 + 𝐬2
▷ PowerTwoRound is applied componentwise (see explanatory text in Section 7.4)
𝑠𝑘 ← skEncode(𝜌, 𝐾, 𝑡𝑟, 𝐬1, 𝐬2, 𝐭0) ▷ 𝐾 and 𝑡𝑟 are for use in signing
